description: Prove that for natural numbers n and k, n - k ≤ n.
statement: theorem sub_le (n k : Nat) : n - k ≤ n
notes: From fp-lean examples/Examples/ProgramsProofs/Inequalities.lean lines 830-836. Ground-truth proof: induction k with | zero => simp | succ k' ih => calc n - Nat.succ k' ≤ n - k' := by apply Nat.pred_le; n - k' ≤ n := ih
